statusBoard.name: Operator index
statusBoard.evidence: A single operator entrypoint is available across pre-write, post-write, evidence intake, separate approval, and launch-readiness gates.
statusBoard.nextAction: Start from the operator index before opening the first-reviewer execution bundle or dry-run packet.

statusBoard.name: One-page runbook
statusBoard.evidence: A printable one-page runbook is available for the first reviewer, compressing the operator index into hard-stop review steps.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as the day-of-review checklist; it is not real notes, approval, release, or readiness.

statusBoard.name: Runbook negative cases
statusBoard.evidence: Negative cases prove the one-page runbook cannot be misused as real notes, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.
statusBoard.nextAction: Keep this guard passing before using the runbook in human review preparation.

statusBoard.name: Pre-write sample dossier
statusBoard.evidence: A read-only handoff packet is available for the first 12 lesson cards, 72 note fields, 5 direct candidates, runbook negative cases, and future post-write commands.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it only to brief a human reviewer; it must not create notes, approvals, release candidates, or readiness claims.

statusBoard.name: Filled-notes positive control v2
statusBoard.evidence: A temporary-file positive control proves complete reviewer notes can reach evidence intake and separate-approval candidates without auto-approval or real overlay writes.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as validation of the gate chain only; it is not real reviewer evidence.

statusBoard.name: Post-write approval drill
statusBoard.evidence: A temporary post-write drill proves approval-review candidates still cannot become approval, learner-facing release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as validation of future post-write blockers only; it is not real reviewer evidence or approval.

statusBoard.name: Direct-candidate post-write drill
statusBoard.evidence: A temporary direct-candidate drill validates BEA, BLS, CFTC, and SEC candidate sourceFitNotes boundaries without confirming source use or learner-facing evidence.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as validation of sourceFitNotes decision boundaries only; it is not real source confirmation.

statusBoard.name: Post-write validation simulator
statusBoard.evidence: A temporary full post-write simulator chains completion audit, evidence intake, separate approval gate, and release-drift negative cases without touching the real overlay.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it to rehearse the future post-write validation order only; it is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, or readiness.

statusBoard.name: Sequence consistency gate
statusBoard.evidence: A sequence gate checks first-reviewer execution steps, operator phases, post-write commands, dry-run commands, and packet order for contiguous numbering and cross-links.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run it after the first-reviewer reports regenerate; it is an operations integrity check, not review evidence or approval.

statusBoard.name: Day-of-review packet freeze
statusBoard.evidence: A frozen day-of-review packet is available with explicit input, expected output, failure route, and forbidden actions for every first-reviewer step.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as the final pre-write checklist; it is not real notes, approval, release, or readiness.

statusBoard.name: Human execution bundle
statusBoard.evidence: A single-page execution index is available for opening reviewer files in the intended order.
statusBoard.nextAction: Start from the execution bundle, then move through handoff, worksheet, source roles, note gates, and validation gates.

statusBoard.name: Printable checklist pack
statusBoard.evidence: A printable per-lesson checklist pack is available with 12 lesson cards and 72 blank note-field boxes.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it only for manual review tracking; it is not real notes, approval, or release evidence.

statusBoard.name: Evidence intake summary
statusBoard.evidence: An intake summary is available for future real reviewer notes and separate-approval candidate triage.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it only after a human-created overlay exists; current generated state must report zero real candidates.

statusBoard.name: Separate approval review gate
statusBoard.evidence: A separate manual approval gate is available after evidence intake, keeping candidates from becoming automatic approvals.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it only to triage candidates for a later human approval review; it does not approve, publish, or promote lessons.

statusBoard.name: Release readiness negative cases
statusBoard.evidence: Negative cases prove approval, learner-facing release, production readiness, and commercial-ready drift are rejected.
statusBoard.nextAction: Keep this passing before any future real overlay or release-review artifact is treated as meaningful evidence.

statusBoard.name: Launch readiness dashboard
statusBoard.evidence: A launch readiness dashboard is available to summarize evidence intake, approval gate, release drift guard, green grounding, and blockers.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as a blocker map only; current generated state remains internalTrialReady:false, launchReady:false, and productionReady:false.

statusBoard.name: Rehearsal checklist
statusBoard.evidence: A rehearsal checklist is available for walking 12 lesson cards, 72 note fields, and 5 direct candidates before real note-taking.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use rehearsal to practice the manual flow only; it is not real notes, evidence intake, approval, release, or readiness.

statusBoard.name: Direct candidate decision worksheet
statusBoard.evidence: A blank decision worksheet is available for confirm, downgrade, or blocked decisions across the 5 direct candidates.
statusBoard.nextAction: Do not treat any generated decision row as confirmation; the real reviewer must write sourceFitNotes after source inspection.

statusBoard.name: Source-fit decision summary
statusBoard.evidence: A one-page summary compresses confirm, downgrade, and block criteria for the 5 direct-candidate rows.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it before sourceFitNotes; generated output must not choose or record the decision.

statusBoard.name: SourceFitNotes card pack
statusBoard.evidence: A printable blank card pack is available for the 5 direct-candidate sourceFitNotes rows and 35 required fields.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it only as blank human note-taking scaffolding; generated output must not fill any note field.

statusBoard.name: SourceFitNotes card negative cases
statusBoard.evidence: Negative cases prove prefilled fields, approval wording, trading signals, copied-source instructions, chart-proof misuse, and yellow/red source drift are rejected.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run this immediately after the card pack and before future sourceFitNotes acceptance.

statusBoard.name: SourceFitNotes positive matrix
statusBoard.evidence: A sample-only matrix distinguishes confirm, downgrade, and block note shapes while keeping 0 confirmed decisions.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use as human-writing guidance only; do not copy samples as real reviewer notes or source confirmation.

statusBoard.name: SourceFitNotes human-fill preflight
statusBoard.evidence: A preflight checks reviewer identity, 5 candidate decisions, source identity basis, no-copy checks, and required fields before real sourceFitNotes.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use before any real note entry; it keeps humanFillAllowedNow:false and writeAllowedNow:false.

statusBoard.name: Source fit notes acceptance
statusBoard.evidence: A future sourceFitNotes acceptance gate is available with positive controls and negative cases for direct-candidate notes.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run it after real sourceFitNotes exist; generated controls are not real notes or source confirmation.

statusBoard.name: Real overlay preflight summary
statusBoard.evidence: A final pre-write summary is available across start, creation, direct-candidate, sourceFitNotes, diff-audit, intake, and launch-readiness gates.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it before any write command; current generated state still requires an explicit human decision and keeps writeAllowedNow:false.

statusBoard.name: Real overlay write readiness lock
statusBoard.evidence: A generated write-readiness lock summarizes preflight, creation, temporary drills, and release blockers while keeping writeAllowedNow:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as the last generated hard stop before write mode; it cannot replace explicit human note-taking intent.

statusBoard.name: Real overlay write authorization preview
statusBoard.evidence: A generated authorization preview separates machine-checked gates from missing human authorization while keeping writeAllowedNow:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it to brief the human reviewer before write mode; it is not write permission and cannot create the real overlay.

statusBoard.name: Day-zero write handoff
statusBoard.evidence: A one-page day-zero handoff compresses pre-write checks, human authorization blockers, write-command preview, and future post-write validation order while keeping writeAllowedNow:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Use it as the final operations brief before a human-only write decision; it is not write permission.

statusBoard.name: Dry-run bundle audit
statusBoard.evidence: A pre-write consistency audit ties dry-run, overwrite protection, day-zero handoff, final rehearsal, authorization preview, and write locks together while keeping writeAllowedNow:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run it before any future real overlay write; it is not write permission and cannot create the real overlay.

statusBoard.name: Post-write command pack
statusBoard.evidence: A future post-write command pack is available with strict validation order and failure routes after a real overlay exists.
statusBoard.nextAction: Do not execute it as proof now; current generated state keeps executionAllowedNow:false and real overlay absent.

statusBoard.name: Handoff entrypoint
statusBoard.evidence: 9 files and 10 commands are listed for the first reviewer.
statusBoard.nextAction: Open the handoff before worksheet work.

statusBoard.name: Worksheet scope
statusBoard.evidence: 12 lessons across rewrite_batch_01, rewrite_batch_05 with 2 high-risk rows first.
statusBoard.nextAction: Review high-risk rows before medium or low rows.

statusBoard.name: Source-role decisions
statusBoard.evidence: 45 source-family roles are pre-sorted; 5 direct candidates still need confirmation.
statusBoard.nextAction: Confirm direct vs boundary-only use before any prose rewrite.

statusBoard.name: Direct-candidate confirmation
statusBoard.evidence: 5 direct candidates must be resolved before sourceFitNotes are filled.
statusBoard.nextAction: Open the direct-candidate checklist after the source-role table and before the human note starter.

statusBoard.name: Human note starter
statusBoard.evidence: 12 cards and 72 blank required note fields are available.
statusBoard.nextAction: Fill notes only after actual human review work.

statusBoard.name: Safe note examples
statusBoard.evidence: Safe note examples are available in the dry-run packet as examples only, not real reviewer notes.
statusBoard.nextAction: Read examples before writing notes, but do not copy them into the real overlay without actual review work.

statusBoard.name: Human review start
statusBoard.evidence: A final human start checklist is available before any real status overlay is created.
statusBoard.nextAction: Complete the checklist manually before running any explicit write initializer.

statusBoard.name: Real overlay creation
statusBoard.evidence: creationAllowedNow:false; real overlay present:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run the write initializer only after explicit human note-taking starts.

statusBoard.name: Post-write validation
statusBoard.evidence: A post-write validation playbook is listed for the moment after a human-created real overlay exists.
statusBoard.nextAction: After explicit write mode, run completion, note lint, curriculum, knowledge, browser, and full verify gates before any separate approval review.

statusBoard.name: Real overlay diff audit
statusBoard.evidence: A diff audit is available to compare any future real overlay against the blank first-reviewer template.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run it after a human-created overlay exists to see filled fields, blank fields, structural mismatches, unsafe wording, and copying-risk wording.

statusBoard.name: Note quality lint
statusBoard.evidence: Real note issues:0; negative cases passing:6/6.
statusBoard.nextAction: Run after real notes exist, before ready-for-separate-approval status.

statusBoard.name: Completion audit
statusBoard.evidence: readyBatches:0; statusOverlayPresent:false.
statusBoard.nextAction: Do not claim batch readiness until real complete notes pass the audit.

stopConditions: Stop if a real status overlay appears without explicit human note-taking.
Stop if any note field is prefilled by generated scaffolding.
Stop if any artifact changes approvalStatus, learnerFacingRelease, productionReady, or lesson grade.
Stop if any rewrite proposes buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, broker/order workflow, automation, performance claims, or real-money guidance.
Stop if any external source body text is copied into notes or lesson prose.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This dashboard is reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change lesson grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
